case_title: JOEL HERNANDEZ CHITAY VS. STARLITE DESIGN DISPLAY INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHITAY, JOEL HERNANDEZ AS TO DEFENDANT STARLITE DESIGN DISPLAY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHITAY, JOEL HERNANDEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARLITE DESIGN DISPLAY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,288.94 PRINCIPAL, $12.20 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,481.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
